title: Verify FN-006 dependencies are satisfied
description: FN-006 blocked: FN-007 and FN-005 must be marked as "done" before FN-006 can proceed. FN-007 has all 8 steps complete but is still in "In Progress" state. FN-005 has 6/7 steps done (step 6 "Documentation & Delivery" still pending). FN-006 requires both dependencies to be fully complete and marked as "done" in the task board.

log.outcome: The FN-016 specification is based on outdated/stale information. Both FN-005 and FN-007 are already marked as "done" in the task board with all steps complete and merged to main. The task's core premise (that FN-006 is blocked by incomplete dependencies) is factually incorrect, making most of the specified work unnecessary.

The specification has a clear mission for dependency verification but includes an out-of-scope directive to modify external tasks (FN-005/FN-007) that conflicts with the stated file scope, and references to step counts for FN-005/FN-007 need validation against actual task definitions.

The specification is well-structured, clear, and appropriate for a low-risk meta-task focused on task board dependency verification. All steps have concrete, verifiable outcomes, file scope is accurately limited to the FN-016 task directory, and the mission directly addresses the reported FN-006 blocker without scope creep.
